name: Ujjivan Financial Services Limited
summary: Ujjivan Financial Services Limited provides financial services to economically active poor in India. It offers micro and rural finance products, housing loans; personal loans, vehicle loans, institutional loans, agri loans, and staff loans, as well as secured and unsecured loans to micro and small businesses. The company also provides group and individual insurance products. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 575 branches. The company was formerly known as Ujjivan Financial Services Private Limited and changed its name to Ujjivan Financial Services Limited in November 2015. Ujjivan Financial Services Limited was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Bengaluru, India.
